title: Death Toll
description: This mod adds a customizable death counter to the game, with optional configurable punishments at specific death counts!
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d5bab6b8dd7ef67d810285431c28ee59ff23319.png)
Death Toll adds a customizable death counter, with optional configurable punishments, Along side lots of new game mechanics cenetred around death to spice things up more.

To get started, Craft the Death compendium, and from there, you can start your journey.

You can customize the death counter by pressing _f8_! (Keybind can be configured)

What to expect from the mod!
Cannibalism, A lore disc, sacrificing items or the flesh of your own dead friends to save your own life, Lots more uses to echo shards, a more useful recovery compass, and a few advancements to keep you engaged along the way! (there's a few hidden ones, you'll have to figure those out yourself tho!)
